heading: Omitted
label: 1231 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided for judgment funds to be distributed in equal shares to enrolled members of the tribe, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–417, § 184 Stat. 868Sept. 25, 1970
